name: gitpreview
description: Preview various file types directly on GitHub without leaving the page.

scripts.build: vite build && cp manifest.json dist/ && cp -r assets dist/
scripts.package: npm run build && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && CHROME=$(find ~/.cache/ms-playwright -name 'chrome' -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1) && mkdir -p release && if [ -f release/gitpreview.pem ]; then "$CHROME" --pack-extension=$PWD/dist --pack-extension-key=$PWD/release/gitpreview.pem --no-message-box 2>/dev/null; else "$CHROME" --pack-extension=$PWD/dist --no-message-box 2>/dev/null && mv dist.pem release/gitpreview.pem; fi && mv dist.crx "release/gitpreview-v$VERSION.crx" && echo "Created release/gitpreview-v$VERSION.crx"
